name: Zombie Wasteland Together
short_description: Zombie Wasteland Together is a 1–4 player co-op zombie shooter set in a post-apocalyptic desert. Team up with friends, fight endless hordes of infected, and survive using powerful weapons.
reasons: 協力/対戦/パーティ系: co-op

name: Tales Beyond The Tomb - No Witnesses
short_description: A psychological horror anthology inspired by disturbing real-life cases. In No Witnesses, a simple road trip turns into a brutal fight for survival when two sisters cross paths with a ruthless serial killer stalking the highways at night.
reasons: 協力/対戦/パーティ系: horror

name: Treasure Beach
short_description: 听，海浪退潮了！踩着柔软的细沙，循着探测器清脆的“滴滴”声，挖出深埋沙底的惊喜盲盒！将物件带回工坊，伴随毛刷“唰唰”擦拭的白噪音，体验极致解压的变废为宝。把锃光瓦亮的宝物摆进橱窗，在金币落袋的“叮当”声中用心经营你的海边小店。从贪婪酒店手中买回沙滩——别让浪漫变成私人领地，这片自由的海风归你守护！
reasons: 現在プレイヤー50人以上

name: Company Rising
short_description: In this business simulation game, you take on the role of an entrepreneur, starting with a small team of just a few people and gradually building your very own corporate empire, step by step.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー50人以上

name: Summer Sisters
short_description: It's been years since Yuu last visited the countryside, and this summer, he'll finally be reunited with the sisters Hana, Rina, and Hina! Unfortunately, his mom has to hurry home, so he'll be staying with the three of them for a while. Find out what fun awaits him in Japanese countryside!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー50人以上

name: Poem of the Starherd
short_description: A relaxing farming simulation game where you take care of humanoid spirits in a mysterious world. Grow crops, raise spirits (animals), live together with someone you love, and enjoy fun-filled days with a variety of approaches!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー50人以上

name: NTR Idol: Déjà Vu
short_description: Become Eri's manager and lead the newcomer through her special training and the dark underbelly of the idol industry. Her boyfriend Harry can only watch as she blossoms from a innocent girl into an experienced idol.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー50人以上

name: Hentai World Forest
short_description: Clear the grid by using logic to avoid hidden mines and flag threats. This minimalist puzzle game offers strategic, timeless brain training and satisfying gameplay at your own pace.

name: Chill Fishing
short_description: Chill Fishing is the ultimate laid-back desktop fishing experience!

name: Way of Horny: Lucky Plumber
short_description: Way of Horny: Lucky Plumber is a straightforward horny puzzle game: clear the levels, earn the reward—hot, pleasure-packed H-scenes in Full HD.

name: Dragon Kisser
short_description: Left alone as your little village’s last hope, you: Domingo, know what you must do to save your people and also pull a hot date, and that is to do what you know best: Romance the dragon attacking your home! Put your charisma to the test in this cheeky third-person soulslike boss battle!

name: TD Run: Survivors
short_description: Battle through hordes of foes in this roguelike blend of survivors, bullet hell, and tower defense. Conquering TD Run will require more than simple survivor-esque DPS checks. Determine optimal character and weapon specific builds and employ real-time tactics to stay ahead of the increasing enemies.

name: Chopping Together🌲
short_description: A 1-4 player co-op, You are stuck in a forest alone or together with one goal to chop every tree in sight. Chop Trees, Gather Wood, Make Money And Upgrade Your Tools
reasons: 協力/対戦/パーティ系: co-op

name: Sinner's Siesta
short_description: Explore a sun-drenched Mexican village in this ultimate 3D adult sandbox. Choose your view, pick from dozens of detailed positions, and indulge in pure, unscripted passion with stunning interactive companions anytime, anywhere. No forced stories—just absolute freedom and endless pleasure.

name: Infinite Bread
short_description: Infinite Bread is a bread-themed idle AFK casual game You are a giant loaf, endlessly feeding your breadfolk. Spend bread to expand your realm, watch your empire flourish, and enjoy soaring numbers. feed millions while your hands stay free for other royal duties.

name: A Good Deed On Harris Avenue
short_description: Untangle a web of wants and wishes from the residents of Harris Avenue in this brief PSX-styled puzzle-adventure game. Bask in the piercing heat of a summer afternoon, explore an intricately hand-crafted environment, and discover what A Good Deed On Harris Avenue has to say.

name: Destruction of Heavenly Bliss
short_description: A roguelite shoot 'em up with an oldschool aesthetic and an intense gameplay loop. Fight through 9 levels of a grueling training simulation, growing stronger with every loop, and realize ignorance truly is bliss.

name: The Labyrinth on Burrow Hill
short_description: Unravel a thread of riddles and mystery as you progress your way through the atmospheric halls of a dazzlingly large, long-deserted labyrinth. Explore the vistas of spectacular rooms and the hidden challenges within. Do you have what it takes to find what lies at the labyrinth's centre?

name: 100 Madagascar Cats
short_description: 🐾 Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! 😻 Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. 🐈🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈

name: Snake Coil: Puzzle Adventure
short_description: A relaxing 3D puzzle game where you guide a cute forest snake that grows every move and must fill every tile on the grid.

name: The Hidden Room
short_description: The Hidden Room is a relaxing erotic Arkanoid-style game where you break blocks, keep the ball in play, and gradually reveal seductive images of a charming maid.

name: Submerged Lights
short_description: After traveling to a country town to move into the house he inherited, Andrew finds the town flooded. While wondering what to do, he spots a dim light coming from the flooded library, in the middle of the night. Investigating, he finds that it belongs to a small fairy, trapped inside of a lantern...

name: PinballRobotDoctor
short_description: "PinballRobotDoctor" is a "simple" pinball game. Control the cybernetic pinball "mechanical repair" device, using your fingertips to precisely deflect the metal pinball onto the launcher. Overcome obstacles by colliding with mechanisms and ultimately repair the target to complete the level.

name: PX2: The Termination
short_description: PX2 is a wonderfully wacky platformer with exquisite music and goofy visuals to top it all off. Jump, shoot, and fall in a hole as you explore the many worlds of PX2!

name: Retronaut
short_description: A rogue star pilot lost between galaxies—upgrade your ship, harness ancient artifacts, and survive relentless alien hordes in this cosmic action roguelite.

name: SIGNAL PIT
short_description: A fast-paced monster arena roguelite where every beast has unique passive traits, active skills, and powerful overclock abilities. Build your mutation loadout, survive deadly fights, and evolve between runs.

name: Cave Of Treats
short_description: Live a spooky Halloween night as a skeleton dressed up as a mummy! Play a haunted old arcade game that, on Halloween night, can bring monsters out of the TV. Fight off waves of monsters trying to escape the game to steal all your candy!

name: Late for School
short_description: A mashup of Crazy Taxi–style arcade chaos and bus-driving simulation, wrapped in a pixel-art Saturday morning cartoon vibe.

name: 1B1E
short_description: Welcome to the city where the sun went out forever. Only rain, darkness, and an endless stream of corpses.

name: BeaconBound
short_description: Collect 15 glowing beacons in a living procedural world. Unlock boost, shield, and stasis to outsmart guardians that adapt as you progress, while weather and terrain reshape every run.
